companyNameFull.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司
companyNameFull.en: Shye Jih Mechanical Engineering Co., Ltd.

footerText.zh: 切粒機押出模具製造｜機械及轉動設備維修｜金屬零件製造｜設備改良組裝
footerText.en: Extrusion Die Manufacturing | Rotating Equipment Repair | Metal Part Manufacturing | Equipment Upgrade & Assembly

metaTitle.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司｜主頁介紹

metaDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司專注切粒機押出模具製造、機械及轉動設備維修、金屬零件製造、設備改良與組裝。
metaDescription.en: Shye Jih specializes in extrusion dies, rotating equipment repair, metal parts, and integrated equipment assembly.

eyebrow.zh: 專業機械工程與精密加工

heroTitle.zh:
協億機械工程有限公司
專注模具製造、設備維修
與特殊材質加工
heroTitle.en:
Shye Jih Mechanical Engineering
Focused on die manufacturing, equipment repair,
and special-alloy machining

heroDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司創立於民國七十八年，長期投入橡膠顆粒押出模具改良製造、轉動機械零件再生製新、瓦斯與重油及酸液噴頭製造、機械設備組裝，以及特殊材質加工與製造，累積了豐富而扎實的實務經驗。
heroDescription.en: Founded in 1989, we have decades of hands-on experience in extrusion die improvement, rotating machinery refurbishment, nozzle manufacturing, equipment assembly, and special material machining.

caption.zh: 圖片先維持原模板，後續可替換為廠房、機台或工程實績照片
caption.en: Replace with factory, equipment, or project photos.

description.zh: 公司成立多年，持續服務石化、橡膠與材料相關產業，具備實務加工與設備維修整合能力。
description.en: Long-term service for petrochemical, rubber, and material industries with integrated repair and machining capabilities.

description.zh: 可加工 SUS316、SUS304、17-4PH、Hastelloy C-276、Hastelloy B-3、B-2、Stellite No.6、No.12 等材料。
description.en: Supports SUS316, SUS304, 17-4PH, Hastelloy, and Stellite materials for high-spec projects.

description.zh: 從零件製造、模具改良到設備組裝與維修，提供兼具效率與品質的工程支援。
description.en: From parts production to die enhancement and equipment assembly, we deliver efficient and reliable engineering support.

featuredSectionTitle.zh: 穩健服務工業客戶，提供精密加工與機械工程解決方案
featuredSectionTitle.en: Serving industrial clients with precision machining and practical engineering solutions

caption.zh: 切粒機押出模具製造
caption.en: Extrusion die manufacturing

description.zh: 提供切粒機押出模具製造、金屬零件加工與特殊材質製造服務。
description.en: Manufacturing services for extrusion dies, metal parts, and special-alloy components.

caption.zh: 機械及轉動設備維修
caption.en: Rotating equipment repair

description.zh: 具備機械及轉動設備維修、設備改良與整機組裝的豐富經驗。
description.en: Extensive experience in rotating equipment maintenance, upgrades, and full-machine assembly.

caption.zh: 長期合作工業客戶
caption.en: Long-term industrial clients

description.zh: 服務客戶涵蓋塑膠、橡膠、材料與機械密封領域，並參與電廠深水泵維修合作。
description.en: Our client base spans plastics, rubber, materials, and mechanical sealing industries, including power plant pump projects.

aboutSectionTitle.zh: 以完善機具與加工經驗，回應高規格製造與維修需求
aboutSectionTitle.en: Advanced equipment and practical know-how for high-spec manufacturing and maintenance

aboutSectionDescription.zh: 公司配備 CNC 車床、立式中心加工機、平面磨床、傳統車銑設備、量測平台與三次元量測儀，並使用日本 BIG 大昭和精機刀具與瑞典 Sandvik 抗震刀把，提供穩定加工品質。
aboutSectionDescription.en: Our workshop is equipped with CNC lathes, VMCs, grinders, conventional machining equipment, and 3D measurement systems to ensure stable machining quality.

caption.zh: 圖片保留原模板，後續可放廠區內部、加工現場或實績照片
caption.en: Replace with factory interior, machining scenes, or project photos.

metaTitle.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司｜服務項目

metaDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司提供切粒機押出模具製造、設備維修、金屬零件製造與設備改良組裝等服務。
metaDescription.en: Service scope includes extrusion dies, repair works, metal parts manufacturing, and equipment upgrades.

pageTitle.zh: 提供製造、維修、改良與組裝的一站式工程支援
pageTitle.en: One-stop engineering support across manufacturing, repair, retrofit, and assembly

pageDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司主要服務聚焦於模具製造、設備維修、精密零件加工與設備改良組裝，依實際需求提供穩定、務實且可落地的工程方案。
pageDescription.en: We provide practical and stable engineering solutions for die manufacturing, equipment repair, precision machining, and equipment retrofitting.

caption.zh: 圖片先維持原模板，後續可替換為現場加工或機台照片
caption.en: Replace with on-site machining or equipment photos.

description.zh: 針對橡膠顆粒押出模具進行開發、製造與改良，提供符合產線需求的精密加工與使用優化。
description.en: Development, manufacturing, and optimization of extrusion dies tailored to production line needs.

description.zh: 承接各式機械與轉動設備維修、整修與零件更新，協助設備恢復穩定運轉並延長使用壽命。
description.en: Repair, overhaul, and parts replacement for rotating equipment to restore stable operations.

description.zh: 提供各類金屬零件加工製造，並具備轉動機械零件再生製新的實務經驗，可依需求製作或修復零件。
description.en: Manufacturing and refurbishment of metal parts with practical expertise in rotating machinery components.

caption.zh: 可替換為切粒模具、噴頭或葉片加工照片
caption.en: Replace with die, nozzle, or blade machining images.

caption.zh: 可替換為整修、量測或組裝作業照片
caption.en: Replace with maintenance, inspection, or assembly photos.

timelineTitle.zh: 從特殊材質加工到設備整合，服務內容完整延伸
timelineTitle.en: From special-material machining to full equipment integration

description.zh: 設備改良與組裝，包含設備總成、水冷式軸承箱、切刀座及切粒刀相關製作與整合。
description.en: Equipment retrofit and assembly including water-cooled bearing housings and pelletizer knife systems.

description.zh: 瓦斯、重油與酸液噴頭製造，具備功能性零件製作與改良能力。
description.en: Manufacturing and enhancement for gas, heavy oil, and acid nozzles.

description.zh: 特殊材質加工與製造，包含 SUS316、SUS304、17-4PH、Hastelloy 系列與 Stellite 硬面焊加工。
description.en: Special material processing including stainless, Hastelloy alloys, and Stellite hardfacing.

description.zh: 硬面焊加工、磨粉機刀輪整修與動平衡校正、鋯合金葉片螺牙再生等精密整修服務。
description.en: Precision refurbishment such as hardfacing, balancing corrections, and zirconium blade thread restoration.

description.zh: 可依客戶現場需求進行客製化製作、維修與改善，支援多樣工業設備應用。
description.en: Customized manufacturing, repair, and improvements based on on-site conditions.

metaTitle.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司｜服務客戶

metaDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司服務高雄塑酯、台灣橡膠、台灣苯乙烯、長興材料路竹廠、環球橡膠等客戶。
metaDescription.en: Trusted by clients in petrochemical, rubber, and materials manufacturing sectors.

pageTitle.zh: 長期服務石化、橡膠、材料與機械工程相關產業
pageTitle.en: Long-term partnerships in petrochemical, rubber, materials, and machinery sectors

pageDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司自創立以來，持續為多家工業客戶提供加工、維修、改良與零件製造服務，建立長期合作與穩定信任。
pageDescription.en: Since founding, we have supported industrial clients with machining, repair, retrofit, and part manufacturing services.

caption.zh: 圖片先維持原模板，後續可替換為合作案例或現場作業照片
caption.en: Replace with case studies or on-site project photos.

caption.zh: 石化與材料產業
caption.en: Petrochemical & materials

description.zh: 高雄塑酯、台灣橡膠、台灣苯乙烯、長興材料路竹廠、環球橡膠（小港廠、高雄廠、大陸惠州廠）等。
description.en: Including KaoHsiung Plastics, Taiwan Rubber, Taiwan Styrene, Eternal Materials, and Universal Rubber sites.

subtitle.zh: 涵蓋塑膠、橡膠與材料相關製程設備需求。
subtitle.en: Covering equipment needs across plastics, rubber, and materials processes.

caption.zh: 機械密封零件代工
caption.en: Mechanical seal components

description.zh: 為英國機械軸封 JOHN CRANE 公司之機械軸封零件代工廠商，具備穩定製造與配合能力。
description.en: Experienced OEM supplier for mechanical seal components with stable quality and delivery.

subtitle.zh: 可支援精密零件與指定材質加工需求。
subtitle.en: Supports precision components and specified material requirements.

caption.zh: 電廠設備維修合作
caption.en: Power plant maintenance

description.zh: 2024 至 2025 年與 SULZER 公司合作，維修興達電廠與台中火力發電廠多級式深水泵。
description.en: From 2024 to 2025, cooperated with SULZER on deep-water multistage pump repairs for major power plants.

subtitle.zh: 具備大型設備維修與現場配合作業經驗。
subtitle.en: Strong on-site coordination for large-scale equipment repair projects.

detailDescription.zh: 實績包含噴頭製造改良、精密鑄造特殊材質風帽開發、硬面焊加工、磨粉機刀輪整修與動平衡校正、鋯合金葉片螺牙再生、切粒螺旋刀製造、切粒模座設備總成、水冷式軸承箱、切刀座及切粒刀、切粒模具開發製造、齒輪箱軸承及齒輪更新、ABB TURBIN 軸承座製新、可調式風門製新及葉片開發等。
detailDescription.en: Projects include nozzle enhancement, special-alloy precision casting components, hardfacing, balancing corrections, thread restoration, and complete pelletizer systems.

cooperationDescription.zh: 依客戶設備條件、材質需求與現場狀況提供客製加工、整修與改良方案，重視品質、配合度與交期穩定。
cooperationDescription.en: We deliver customized machining and refurbishment plans based on site condition, materials, and schedule priorities.

caption.zh: 可替換為客戶案例、零件成品或維修前後對照照片
caption.en: Replace with case photos, finished parts, or before/after comparisons.

metaTitle.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司｜機台設備

metaDescription.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司配備 CNC 車床、立式中心加工機、平面磨床、傳統車銑設備與三次元量測儀。
metaDescription.en: Equipped with CNC lathes, VMCs, grinders, conventional machining lines, and 3D measurement systems.

pageTitle.zh: 完善加工設備與量測工具，支援多元精密工程需求
pageTitle.en: Comprehensive equipment and metrology tools for diverse precision engineering needs

pageDescription.zh: 目前廠內具備 CNC 車床、立式中心加工機、平面磨床、傳統車銑設備與三次元量測儀，可因應零件製造、模具加工、整修與量測需求。
pageDescription.en: Our equipment supports part manufacturing, die machining, refurbishment, and precision measurement workflows.

caption.zh: 圖片先維持原模板，後續可替換為主要機台全景或量測作業照片
caption.en: Replace with panoramic equipment photos or metrology operation shots.

equipmentList.en: AWEA A+1400 VMC with 4th axis (2 units)

equipmentList.en: AWEA A+1800 VMC with 4th axis (1 unit)

equipmentList.zh: 800 x 400 自動平面磨床 1 部
傳統銑床 2 部，附分度頭
equipmentList.en: Conventional milling machines with indexing heads (2 units)

equipmentList.zh: 日本 KEYENCE XM-5000 移動式 3 次元量測儀

caption.zh: 可替換為 CNC 車床或立式加工機照片
caption.en: Replace with CNC lathe or VMC photos.

caption.zh: 可替換為量測設備、磨床或傳統車銑設備照片
caption.en: Replace with metrology, grinder, or conventional machine photos.

toolingDescription.zh: 本公司 CNC 加工刀把均採用日本 BIG 大昭和精機加工刀具與全套搪孔刀具，另備有瑞典 Sandvik 抗震刀把，加工設備與機械工具齊全，可支援穩定且高精度的加工需求。
toolingDescription.en: We use BIG Daishowa tooling systems and Sandvik anti-vibration holders to ensure stable and high-precision machining.

measurementDescription.zh: 搭配大理石量測平台與 KEYENCE XM-5000 移動式三次元量測儀，可進行尺寸確認與加工精度檢測，提升製程品質與交件穩定性。
measurementDescription.en: With granite platforms and KEYENCE XM-5000 systems, we validate dimensional accuracy and machining precision consistently.

caption.zh: 可替換為刀具、量測過程或工件細節照片
caption.en: Replace with tooling, measurement procedures, or workpiece detail photos.

metaTitle.zh: 協億機械工程有限公司｜品質認證

metaDescription.zh: 以專業認證與量測管理流程，確保每個加工與維修步驟都符合品質標準。
metaDescription.en: Professional certification and measurement workflows ensure each manufacturing and repair process meets quality standards.

pageTitle.zh: 可追蹤、可驗證的執行品質

pageDescription.zh: 我們透過專業認證、檢驗流程與量測機制，確保加工品質與成果透明。
pageDescription.en: We maintain quality through certifications, inspection checklists, and measurable process controls.

caption.zh: 建議放檢驗室、量測儀器或證書牆照片
caption.en: Replace with inspection room, metrology equipment, or certificate wall photos.

caption.zh: 可替換 ISO / 品質認證證書
caption.en: Replace with ISO or other certification photos.

certItems.zh: 加工與品保流程文件管理制度
certItems.en: Documented machining and quality workflow management

certItems.zh: 關鍵尺寸量測與可追溯紀錄
客製品檢驗項目與出貨檢核機制
certItems.en: Custom inspection items and pre-delivery verification

inspectionItems.zh: 需求確認：明確加工規格與驗收標準
inspectionItems.en: Requirement alignment: define specs and acceptance criteria

inspectionItems.zh: 製程檢核：依工序進行尺寸與外觀確認
inspectionItems.en: In-process checks: verify dimensions and surface quality

inspectionItems.zh: 出貨驗證：建立最終檢驗與交付紀錄
inspectionItems.en: Shipment validation: final inspection with delivery records

交件品質報告與改善建議
measureItems.en: Delivery quality reports and improvement recommendations

pageDescription.en: If you need extrusion die production, equipment repair, metal parts, or retrofit services, our team is ready to help.
